references.title: Using Recommender Systems for Matching Students with Suitable Specialization: An Exploratory Study at King Abdulaziz University
references.journal: International Journal of Emerging Technologies in Learning (iJET)

annotations.text: Paper presents a recommender for university specialization. This is an important problem to address because choosing a major is very relevant for students. The recommender uses Collaborative Filtering and its acccuracy was assessed with K-Fold Cross-Validation. Model is reported to work well.
